title: DUP-FEC-2
short description: DUP-FEC-2 is a further development of the DUP-ARQ system and the system characteristics are very similar. Uses FEC instead of ARQ and runs at either 125 bd or 250 bd.
description: **DUP-FEC-2** is a further development of the [DUP-ARQ](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/DUP-ARQ) system and the system characteristics are very similar. Uses FEC instead of ARQ and runs at either 125 bd or 250 bd. Like [DUP-ARQ-2](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/DUP-ARQ-2), DUP-FEC-2 allows transmission of ITA-2 (Baudot) or ITA-5 (ASCII) characters.
